titles: "2만 원이 사라지는 경로" ETF 한 주 사면 내 돈이 실제로 어디로 가는지 밀키트처럼 뜯어봤다
ETF 한 주 안에 500개 기업이 들어있다 — 밀키트처럼 뜯어본 진짜 내부 구조
매수 버튼 누르면 2만 원이 거치는 4단계 — LP·AP·NAV 전부 해부
thumbnail_texts: 2만 원이 사라지는 경로 / ETF 안에 뭐가 있나

character_poses.1: INTRO-03 돋보기로 분석 — ETF 밀키트 내부 해부 탐정 톤
character_poses.2: INTRO-04 차트 가리키며 설명 — 2만 원 여행 경로 프레젠터
character_poses.3: REACT-04 깜짝 놀람 — 레버리지·환헤지 함정 경고

meta.design_rule: 상단 47% 이미지 + 하단 53% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 스컹크 벡터 스타일. 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 돋보기 분석(INTRO-03). 좌측 스컹크가 대형 금색 돋보기로 우측 반투명 ETF 밀키트 박스 내부를 들여다봄. 박스 안에 애플·삼성·LG·SK하이닉스 등 500개 기업 로고 실루엣이 비율별로 담겨있는 투명 포장. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes with determined detective expression, small pink nose. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, half body shot, holding a large golden magnifying glass with both paws and leaning forward to examine. On the RIGHT side: a large transparent meal-kit style package with clear plastic wrapping, clearly visible inside are miniature stylized company logos of Apple, Samsung, LG, SK, Google, Microsoft and many more tech and financial icons arranged in proportional weight layers like ingredients, glowing with blue and gold accents. A small golden banknote icon floats near the bottom-right of the package being drawn into it. Background: clean navy blue gradient with subtle golden bokeh and holographic grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no watermark anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 차트설명(INTRO-04). 중앙 스컹크가 4단계 여행 다이어그램을 프레젠터처럼 가리킴. 좌에서 우로: 증권사 앱(스마트폰) → 거래소(건물) → LP(마트 아이콘) → AP(공장 아이콘). 각 단계 위를 황금 2만 원 지폐가 이동하는 화살표 연결. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, confident teacher expression. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk stands CENTER-LEFT in the upper frame, full body shot, one paw extended forward pointing at a horizontal 4-stage journey diagram on the right side. The diagram shows four glowing icon nodes connected by animated golden arrows: 1) a smartphone with a generic stock trading app screen showing candlestick chart, 2) a classical stock exchange building with columns, 3) a small supermarket store icon representing a liquidity provider, 4) a factory icon representing an authorized participant. Between each node, stylized golden banknotes with subtle wing motifs float along the arrow path. Background: deep navy blue gradient with a faint world map outline and financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no readable labels on icons anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 깜짝 놀람(REACT-04). 스컹크가 양 볼 잡고 충격 리액션. 뒤 배경에 경고 삼각형 아이콘과 음의 복리 그래프(아래로 꺾이는 빨간 곡선), '함정' 상징 덫 실루엣. 레버리지 ETF와 환헤지 H 스티커 아이콘이 떠있음. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes wide open in shock, small pink nose, alarmed panic expression with both paws holding the cheeks. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, upper body shot. On the RIGHT side: a large glowing red warning triangle silhouette shape (no actual text), behind it a stylized downward-plunging negative compound interest curve showing a sharp decay pattern, and a subtle metallic bear trap silhouette at the bottom edge of the upper zone. Two small floating sticker-style icons: one round sticker showing stylized leverage arrow symbols and another showing a currency hedge shield icon. Background: deep crimson red to navy blue gradient with faint financial grid, slight red glow particles floating. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no warning text anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with strong red warning atmosphere.
